Risk_Description: Model assumptions may not hold in changing economic conditions
Mitigation: Quarterly model validation, stress testing, dynamic recalibration

Risk_Description: Implementation delays or technical issues during rollout
Mitigation: Phased rollout, fallback procedures, dedicated IT support

Risk_Description: Economic downturn leading to higher default rates than forecast
Mitigation: Conservative allocation limits, real-time monitoring, scenario planning

Risk_Description: Changes in lending regulations affecting allocation strategy
Mitigation: Regulatory monitoring, flexible policy framework, compliance review
Demand forecasting, capacity planning, automated processing

Risk_Description: Inaccurate or incomplete data affecting model inputs
Mitigation: Data validation checks, anomaly detection, source verification
